name: CLASE-Quant: Adaptive Layer-Sensitive Quantization + Extended Context
author: NewyorkDev
techniques: CLASE-inspired adaptive per-layer quantization (int8 boundary, int6 middle)
Muon optimizer with decoupled weight decay
notes: Inspired by the CLASE Technique (HDXspeed, March 2026) which proved non-uniform layer treatment outperforms uniform approaches. Built with Claude (Anthropic).
